name: Tariq Al-Khathami
description: Tariq Al-Khathami is a Saudi inventor, engineer, and project leader at Saudi Aramco Research & Development Center. He holds 11 USPTO patents in chemical processing, robotics, and pipeline engineering, and has received 8 major professional and royal recognitions.

alumniOf.description: BEng Chemical and Process Engineering, GPA 3.56/4
